curveRmetrics 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
    • Computing Standard Curve Quality Control Metrics using curveRmetrics

Normalise a single DB row to a natural-scale parameter list

Source: R/parameter_normalization_functions.R
dot-normalise_params.Rd

Prefers pre-computed *_nat columns produced by transform_to_natural_units when they are present on row (i.e. when called with curves_nat). Falls back to raw DB columns plus inline conversion otherwise.

Usage

.normalise_params(row, method, verbose = FALSE)

Arguments

row

A single-row data frame (or named list) with curve parameters.

method

Character; either "frequentist" or "bayesian".

verbose

Logical; if TRUE (default FALSE) emits a message when natural-scale columns are detected and used.

Value

A named list with elements family, a, b, c, d, g, and source.

Details

Either way the returned list has an identical structure and scale:

a, d

Natural-scale response asymptotes.

b

Hill slope on the \(\ln(x)\) scale.

c

Natural-scale EC50 (concentration units).

g

Dimensionless asymmetry/shape parameter.

On this page
